title: guettarda umbellata
intro: Guettarda umbellata, also known as the Pride of Jamaica or Jamaica flower, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Guettarda umbellata has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Guettarda umbellata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
